Removed_Other.name: FFlagProfilePlatformEnableBundlesInAssetsCarousel_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enables the display of bundles in the assets carousel on player profiles.
Removed_Other.purpose: Allows players to easily find and purchase bundles of items.
